title: King of the Seven Kingdoms
description: | Issue = With Aemma; Rhaenyra Targaryen; Son; Baelon Targaryen;; With Alicent; Aegon II Targaryen; Helaena Targaryen; Aemond Targaryen; Daeron Targaryen | Siblings = Daemon Targaryen; Ulf the White | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 | Appearances = 11 episodes | First = "The Heirs of the Dragon" | Last = "The Red Sowing" | DeathEp = "The Lord of the Tides" | Actor = Paddy Considine King Viserys I Targaryen, remembered as Viserys the Peaceful, was the fifth king of the Targaryen dynasty to rule the Seven Kingdoms.

title: Prince
description: | Issue = With Laena; Baela Targaryen; Rhaena Targaryen;; With Rhaenyra; Aegon Targaryen; Viserys Targaryen; Visenya Targaryen | Siblings = Viserys I Targaryen; Ulf the White | Arms = A red three-headed dragon with gold scales on black, a border of golden flames | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 3 | Appearances = 22 episodes | First = "The Heirs of the Dragon" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Matt Smith Prince Daemon Targaryen is a prince of the Targaryen dynasty, and the younger brother of King Viserys I Targaryen. He is the uncle and King Consort of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen.

title: Disputed Queen of the Seven Kingdoms
description: | Issue = With Harwin; Jacaerys Velaryon; Lucerys Velaryon; Joffrey Velaryon;; With Daemon; Aegon Targaryen; Viserys Targaryen; Visenya Targaryen | Siblings = Baelon Targaryen;; Half-siblings; Aegon II Targaryen; Helaena Targaryen; Aemond Targaryen; Daeron Targaryen | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 3 | Appearances = 21 episodes | First = "The Heirs of the Dragon" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Emma D'Arcy; Milly Alcock Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen is the daughter and only surviving child of King Viserys I Targaryen and his first wife, Queen Aemma Arryn, and a princess of the Targaryen dynasty. She disputes the claim of her younger half-brother Aegon II, using the style Queen of the Andals and the Rhoynar and the First Men, Lady of the Seven Kingdoms, and Protector of the Realm. A dragonrider, her mount is the she-dragon Syrax.

title: Former King of the Seven Kingdoms in exile
description: | Siblings = Helaena Targaryen; Aemond Targaryen; Daeron Targaryen;; Half-siblings; Rhaenyra Targaryen; Baelon Targaryen | Arms = A golden three-headed dragon on green | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 3 | Appearances = 18 episodes | First = "Second of His Name" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Tom Glynn-Carney; Ty Tennant King Aegon II Targaryen is the former sixth King of the Andals and the Rhoynar and the First Men and Lord of the Seven Kingdoms. His rule was disputed by his older half-sister, Rhaenyra Targaryen. He is the firstborn son of King Viserys I Targaryen and his second wife, Queen Alicent Hightower, and a member of the Targaryen dynasty. Until his incapacitation, he was the rider of the dragon Sunfyre.

title: Claimant King and former Prince Regent
description: Prince Aemond Targaryen, also known as Aemond One-Eye, is the second son and third child of King Viserys I Targaryen and Queen Alicent Hightower. He is the rider of the dragon Vhagar.

title: Queen Consort
description: | Siblings = Aegon II Targaryen; Aemond Targaryen; Daeron Targaryen;; Half-siblings; Rhaenyra Targaryen; Baelon Targaryen | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 3 | Appearances = 16 episodes | First = "King of the Narrow Sea" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Phia Saban; Evie Allen; Ziggy Barker; Marliya Ralphie Queen Helaena Targaryen is the daughter of King Viserys I Targaryen and Alicent Hightower, the sister-wife of King Aegon II Targaryen and the former Queen Consort of the Seven Kingdoms. She is the rider of the dragon Dreamfyre.

title: Prince
description: | Siblings = Aegon II Targaryen; Helaena Targaryen; Aemond Targaryen;; Half-siblings; Rhaenyra Targaryen; Baelon Targaryen | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 2 3 | Appearances = 3 episodes | First = "The Queen Who Ever Was" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Benjamin Evan Ainsworth Prince Daeron Targaryen is a prince of the Targaryen dynasty and the fourth child of King Viserys I Targaryen and Queen Alicent Hightower. He rides the dragon Tessarion.

imageSource.reason: No verified solo asset or officially confirmed actor through S3E3.

title: Prince of Dragonstone
description: | Siblings = Lucerys Velaryon; Joffrey Velaryon;; Maternal half-siblings; Aegon Targaryen; Viserys Targaryen; Visenya Targaryen | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 3 | Appearances = 15 episodes | First = "The Princess and the Queen" | Last = "Rhaenyra Triumphant" | DeathEp = "Salt and Sea, Fire and Blood" | Actor = Harry Collett; Leo Hart Prince Jacaerys Velaryon, nicknamed Jace, was a prince of the Targaryen dynasty, and the firstborn son of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen. He was the rider of the dragon Vermax.

title: Prince and former heir to Driftmark
description: | Siblings = Jacaerys Velaryon; Joffrey Velaryon;; Maternal half-siblings; Aegon Targaryen; Viserys Targaryen; Visenya Targaryen | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 | Appearances = 4 episodes | First = "The Princess and the Queen" | Last = "The Black Queen" | DeathEp = "The Black Queen" | Actor = Elliot Grihault; Harvey Sadler Prince Lucerys Velaryon, nicknamed Luke, was a prince of the Targaryen dynasty and the heir to Driftmark following the presumed death of his legal father, Ser Laenor Velaryon. He was the rider of the dragon Arrax.

title: Prince
description: | Siblings = Jacaerys Velaryon; Lucerys Velaryon;; Maternal half-siblings; Aegon Targaryen; Viserys Targaryen; Visenya Targaryen | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 3 | Appearances = 6 episodes | First = "The Princess and the Queen" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Oscar Eskinazi Prince Joffrey Velaryon is a prince of the Targaryen dynasty and the third son of Princess Rhaenyra Targaryen and Ser Laenor Velaryon. He is bonded to the dragon Tyraxes.

He is bonded to the dragon Stormcloud.

description: | Siblings = Collapse|Aegon Targaryen; Visenya Targaryen;; Paternal half-sisters; Baela Targaryen; Rhaena Targaryen;; Maternal half-brothers; Jacaerys Velaryon; Lucerys Velaryon; Joffrey Velaryon | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 | Appearances = 4 episodes | First = "The Lord of the Tides" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Prince Viserys Targaryen is a prince of the Targaryen dynasty.

She becomes the ward of her grandmother Rhaenys Targaryen following her mother's death and the apparent death of Laenor Velaryon.

title: Lady
description: | Siblings = Baela Targaryen;; Half-siblings; Aegon Targaryen; Viserys Targaryen; Visenya Targaryen | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 3 | Appearances = 13 episodes | First = "The Princess and the Queen" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Phoebe Campbell; Eva Ossei-Gerning Lady Rhaena Targaryen is the youngest daughter of Daemon Targaryen and Laena Velaryon, and the rider of Sheepstealer.

imageSource.reason: The only available TV image depicts the stillborn body and is intentionally not used.

title: Queen Dowager and former Regent
description: Queen Alicent Hightower is the second wife of King Viserys I Targaryen and daughter of Ser Otto Hightower, the Hand of the King. She is the mother of King Aegon II Targaryen, Queen Helaena Targaryen, Prince Aemond Targaryen, and Prince Daeron Targaryen.

title: Hand of the King
description: Ser Otto Hightower was a knight of House Hightower who served as Hand of the King to Jaehaerys I, Viserys I, and Aegon II. He was one of the primary leaders of the Greens during the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Ser
description: Ser Gwayne Hightower is a knight of House Hightower and the eldest son of Ser Otto Hightower. He is a brother of Alicent Hightower.

title: Lord of the Tides
description: Lord Corlys Velaryon, known as the Sea Snake, is the head of House Velaryon, widower of Princess Rhaenys Targaryen, and Hand of the Queen on the Black Council of Rhaenyra Targaryen.

title: Princess
description: Princess Rhaenys Targaryen, also known as Rhaenys Velaryon and the Queen Who Never Was, was a princess of the Targaryen dynasty, and the wife of Lord Corlys Velaryon. She was a dragonrider, her mount being Meleys, the Red Queen. She was the first leader of the Blacks to die in the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Ser
description: | Issue = Legal; Jacaerys Velaryon; Lucerys Velaryon; Joffrey Velaryon | Siblings = Laena Velaryon;; Bastard half-brothers; Alyn of Hull; Addam of Hull | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 | Appearances = 5 episodes | First = "The Heirs of the Dragon" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = John Macmillan; Theo Nate; Matthew Carver Ser Laenor Velaryon is the son and first-born child of Lord Corlys Velaryon and Princess Rhaenys Targaryen, as well as the first husband of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen. As Lord Corlys’s son, he is the presumed deceased former heir to Driftmark. He once rode the dragon Seasmoke.

title: Lady
description: | Siblings = Laenor Velaryon;; Bastard half-brothers; Alyn of Hull; Addam of Hull | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 1 2 | Appearances = 6 episodes | First = "The Heirs of the Dragon" | Last = "Regent" | DeathEp = "The Princess and the Queen" | Actor = Nanna Blondell; Savannah Steyn; Nova Foueillis-Mosé Lady Laena Velaryon was the daughter and second-born child of Corlys Velaryon and Rhaenys Targaryen, the younger sister of Laenor Velaryon and the second wife of Daemon Targaryen. She was the rider of the dragon Vhagar, and the mother of Baela and Rhaena Targaryen.

title: Ser
description: Ser Vaemond Velaryon was a knight of House Velaryon. He was the younger brother of Corlys Velaryon and a commander in the Velaryon navy.

title: Sailor
description: | Siblings = Addam of Hull;; Half-siblings; Laenor Velaryon; Laena Velaryon | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 2 3 | Appearances = 10 episodes | First = "A Son for a Son" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Abubakar Salim Alyn of Hull is a sailor in the Velaryon fleet and a bastard son of Lord Corlys Velaryon.

title: Ser
description: | Siblings = Alyn of Hull;; Half-siblings; Laenor Velaryon; Laena Velaryon | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 2 3 | Appearances = 7 episodes | First = "Rhaenyra the Cruel" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Clinton Liberty Ser Addam of Hull is a bastard son of Lord Corlys Velaryon and the rider of the dragon Seasmoke. He previously worked as a shipwright for the Velaryon fleet.

title: Ser
description: Ser Harwin Strong, popularly called Breakbones, was a knight of House Strong. He was the eldest son and heir of Lord Lyonel Strong of Harrenhal and the brother of Larys Strong.

title: Hand of the King
description: Lord Lyonel Strong was the Lord of Harrenhal and Hand of the King to Viserys I Targaryen. He is the father of Ser Harwin Strong and Larys Strong.

title: Lord of Harrenhal
description: Lord Larys Strong, called the Clubfoot due to his pronounced birth defect, is the Lord of Harrenhal and head of House Strong. He is the second son of Lord Lyonel Strong, and the younger brother of Ser Harwin Strong. Late in the reign of King Viserys I Targaryen, he rose to the position of Lord Confessor. He remains a prominent figure at court when King Aegon II Targaryen ascends to the throne, and is later appointed to the King's Small Council as Master of Whisperers.

title: Hand of the King and Lord Commander of the Kingsguard
description: Ser Criston Cole, also known as the Kingmaker, is a knight of House Cole, Lord Commander of the Kingsguard, and Hand of the King under Aegon II Targaryen. He previously served as a member of the Kingsguard under Viserys I Targaryen and as Rhaenyra Targaryen's sworn protector. Criston is one of the primary leaders of the Greens during the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Lord Commander of the Kingsguard
description: Ser Harrold Westerling is a knight of House Westerling. He was the Lord Commander of Viserys I Targaryen's Kingsguard following the death of Ser Ryam Redwyne.

title: Knight of the Kingsguard
description: Ser Rickard Thorne is a knight of the Kingsguard of Aegon II.

title: Ser
description: Ser Arryk Cargyll was a renowned knight, and member of the Kingsguard of King Aegon II Targaryen. He previously served in the Kingsguard of Viserys I Targaryen.

title: Ser
description: Ser Erryk Cargyll was a renowned knight, and member of the Queensguard of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen, as well as the twin of Ser Arryk Cargyll, a member of the opposing Kingsguard of King Aegon II Targaryen. He formerly served in the Kingsguard of King Viserys I Targaryen, as the sworn shield of Aegon II before his accession to the throne.

title: Grand Maester
description: Orwyle is the Grand Maester on the Small Council of Viserys I Targaryen.

title: Master of Laws
description: Lord Jasper Wylde, known as Ironrod, was the head of House Wylde. Late in the reign of King Viserys I Targaryen, he joined the Small Council, occupying the post of Master of Laws, a position he continued to hold under Aegon II Targaryen.

title: Master of Coin
description: Lord Lyman Beesbury was the Lord of Honeyholt and Master of Coin on the Small Council of King Viserys I Targaryen. He was the first victim of the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Lord of Casterly Rock
description: Lord Jason Lannister was the head of House Lannister, Lord of Casterly Rock, and Warden of the West during the reigns of Viserys I and Aegon II.

title: Master of Coin
description: Ser Tyland Lannister is a knight of House Lannister, and the younger twin of Lord Jason Lannister.

title: Castellan of Harrenhal
description: Ser Simon Strong was a knight of House Strong during the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Ser
description: Ser Hugh the Hammer is a dragonseed and blacksmith living in King's Landing. He is a bastard son of Princess Saera Targaryen and new rider of his grandfather's dragon Vermithor.

title: Ser
description: | Siblings = Half-brothers; Viserys I Targaryen; Daemon Targaryen | Arms = | Series = House of the Dragon | Season = 2 3 | Appearances = 9 episodes | First = "Rhaenyra the Cruel" | Last = | DeathEp = | Actor = Tom Bennett Ser Ulf the White is a resident of King's Landing during the Dance of the Dragons. He claims to be the bastard son of Prince Baelon Targaryen, and the half-brother of the late King Viserys I Targaryen and Prince Daemon Targaryen. He is a dragonrider who rides his grandmother's dragon Silverwing.

title: Healer
description: Alys Rivers is a healer who resides at Harrenhal during the Dance of the Dragons. Although not a maester, she has acted in that capacity since her predecessor fled the ruined stronghold shortly after arriving.

title: Lord of Raventree Hall
description: Lord Benjicot Blackwood is the head of House Blackwood during the Dance of the Dragons.

imageSource.reason: Mentioned only; no actor or screen image exists through S3E3.

title: Ser
description: Ser Willem Blackwood was a member of House Blackwood during the reign of Viserys I. By the early stages of the Dance of the Dragons he has achieved knighthood and become the regent of Raventree Hall, in the name of the child lord Benjicot Blackwood.

title: Ser
description: Lord Amos Bracken is the head of House Bracken and Lord of the Stone Hedge during the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Lord of Winterfell
description: Lord Cregan Stark is the head of House Stark, Lord of Winterfell, and Warden of the North during the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Lord of Riverrun and Lord Paramount of the Trident
description: Lord Oscar Tully is the head of House Tully and Lord Paramount of the Riverlands during the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Mistress of Whisperers
description: Mysaria is a brothel proprietor, information broker, and former prostitute. Under the alias of the White Worm, she leads a network of spies and informants active in King's Landing.

title: Gold Cloak
description: Blood was a member of the City Watch of King's Landing.

title: Ratcatcher
description: Cheese was a ratcatcher in the Red Keep during the Dance of the Dragons.

title: Triarchy Commander
description: Sharako Lohar was a Lyseni serving as a commander of the Triarchy fleet.

title: Lord of Riverrun
description: Lord Grover Tully was the head of House Tully, Lord of Riverrun, and Lord Paramount of the Trident during the reigns of Viserys I and Aegon II.

imageSource.reason: Mentioned only; no actor or screen image exists through S3E3.

description: Queen Aemma Arryn was the first wife of King Viserys I Targaryen and queen consort of the Seven Kingdoms. She is the mother of Rhaenyra Targaryen.
Prince Jaehaerys Targaryen was a prince of the Targaryen dynasty, the son of Aegon II Targaryen and Helaena Targaryen.
Princess Jaehaera Targaryen is a princess of the Targaryen dynasty.

Lady Jeyne Arryn, called the Maiden of the Vale, is the head of House Arryn, Lady of the Eyrie, Defender of the Vale, and Wardeness of the East during the reign of Viserys I and the Dance of the Dragons.
Kat is a resident of King's Landing during the Dance of the Dragons. She is the wife of Hugh the Hammer.
Lord Ormund Hightower is the head of House Hightower and Lord of Oldtown during the Dance of the Dragons.
Ser Jon Roxton, known as Bold Jon, is a knight who lived during the Dance of the Dragons.

Lord Roderick Dustin is the head of House Dustin during the Dance of the Dragons. He is the commander of the Winter Wolves, the advance force of 2,000 battle-hardened elderly warriors that Cregan Stark sent south at the outbreak of the war to fight for Rhaenyra Targaryen.
Ser Luthor Largent is a lowborn knight who served as an officer in the City Watch of King's Landing during the reign of King Viserys I Targaryen and the Dance of the Dragons.
Ser Torrhen Manderly is a knight who lived during the Dance of the Dragons.
Ser Alfred Broome is a household knight sworn to House Targaryen.
Lord Bartimos Celtigar is the head of House Celtigar and Lord of Claw Isle during the Dance of the Dragons.
Gerardys is a maester of the Citadel in service to Rhaenyra Targaryen at Dragonstone.
Lord Gormon Massey is the head of House Massey during the reigns of Viserys I and Aegon II.
Ser Lorent Marbrand is a knight of House Marbrand and member of Rhaenyra Targaryen's Queensguard. He previously served in Viserys I Targaryen's Kingsguard.
Ser Steffon Darklyn was a knight of House Darklyn and Lord Commander of Rhaenyra Targaryen's Queensguard. He previously served in Viserys I Targaryen's Kingsguard.
Lord Simon Staunton is the head of House Staunton and Lord of Rook's Rest during the Dance of the Dragons.
Elinda Massey is a noblewoman of House Massey, the daughter of Lord Gormon Massey, and a lady-in-waiting to Rhaenyra Targaryen.
Dyana is a servant of Aegon and Helaena Targaryen.
Sylvi is the brothel madam of Mother's who resides in King's Landing during the Dance of the Dragons.
Talya was a lady-in-waiting to Queen Alicent Hightower and a spy in Mysaria's employ.

Prince Craghas Drahar was a Myrish prince-admiral of the Triarchy. He was known as the Crabfeeder for his habit of feeding his surviving enemies to crabs by staking them to the shores during the low tide.
Alysanne Blackwood is a member of House Blackwood during the Dance of the Dragons. The aunt of young Lord Benjicot Blackwood, she is a skilled archer and warrior.
Mellos was the Grand Maester on the Small Council of King Viserys I Targaryen.
Lord Hobert Hightower was the head of House Hightower and Lord of Oldtown during the reign of Viserys I. He was the older brother of Ser Otto Hightower, the Hand of the King.
